title: Refreshed
body:
### **⊣ About ⊢**

Refreshed- a reimagined Minecraft experience. That's exactly what Refreshed aims to do, reimagine that feel of Minecraft we all know and love, while staying true to it. This pack also improves upon the vanilla colors of Minecraft, and adds more consistency to the textures.

### **⊣ Contact ⊢**

If you need to contact me for any reason, feel free to contact me through Discord 
- Discord: xbigfatpotatox

### **⊣ Roadmap ⊢**

Current roadmap:
- Items - 70% done
- GUI and particles
- Blocks
- Entities
- Misc

I hope you enjoy!
-BigFatPotat

![Refreshed idk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2422af686fa7171a92e194cb819ad48e2bfcbfa.png)
